Why ARMH & Co

Built for UK SMEs

01

ACCA & ICAEW Qualified

Your accounts handled by chartered professionals with real UK SME experience — not automated tools or offshore junior staff.

02

Proactive Deadline Management

We track every HMRC and Companies House deadline and notify you well in advance. Never miss a filing date again.

03

Fixed Monthly Pricing

Transparent packages with no hidden fees. You know exactly what you pay from incorporation day — no year-end surprises.

What We Offer

Our Services

Bookkeeping & Management Accounts

Accurate monthly bookkeeping with real-time financial insights for informed decision-making.

Learn more

VAT Returns (MTD-Compliant)

Full Making Tax Digital compliance with automated VAT filing directly to HMRC.

Learn more

Year-End Accounts & Corporation Tax

Comprehensive year-end accounts preparation and corporation tax filing with strategic tax planning.

Learn more

Payroll & Auto-Enrolment

Complete payroll management including payslips, RTI submissions, and pension auto-enrolment.

Learn more

Self Assessment

Personal tax returns for directors, freelancers, and high-net-worth individuals.

Learn more

R&D Tax Credits

Maximize your R&D tax credit claims with our specialist technical and financial expertise.

Learn more

Companies House Compliance

All statutory filings including confirmation statements, annual returns, and changes.

Learn more

HMRC Claims

Expert handling of all HMRC correspondence, investigations, and tax refund claims.

Learn more

International Tax Advisory

Cross-border tax planning for UK businesses with international operations or subsidiaries.

Learn more

Custom / month

  • VAT returns (MTD-compliant)
  • Year-end accounts
  • Corporation tax filing
  • Basic payroll (up to 5 employees)
